message:
fix(a11y): add missing diff detection for description, shortcut, and parent changes

The diff_node function was only comparing name, role, bounds, children,
live_region, and state — silently ignoring changes to description,
shortcut, and parent fields. This adds three new A11yChange variants
(DescriptionChanged, ShortcutChanged, ParentChanged) and the
corresponding checks. Also adds with_state() builder method on
A11yNodeInfo and cycle protection (visited set + max depth 1000) to
the ancestors() traversal to prevent infinite loops on malformed trees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
